title: pelargonium × soarboroviae
intro: Pelargonium × soarboroviae, also known as Rose Geranium or Barberton Geranium, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its fragrant flowers and leaves, which contain compounds with medicinal properties, including geraniol and linalool. The health benefits of Pelargonium × soarboroviae include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause and menstrual cramps. The leaves and flowers of this plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and improve overall well-being.
